response:
VERDICT: TAMPERED
ROUND: 60
REASONING: In round 60 the computation of new a is wrong.  
• L0915 gives temp1 = 0x59D862F2.  
• L0918 gives temp2 = 0x2D7AF541.  
Adding them mod 2³² should give 0x87535833:

 0x59D862F2  
+ 0x2D7AF541  
= 0x87535833

The trace (L0919) instead lists new a = 0x87358333, which differs by 0x02000000 (a single-bit error in bit 25). Everything earlier in the round is consistent, so the tamper occurs at the final addition of temp1 + temp2 in round 60.
